name: Ats
author: ETS2World
description:
Detroit Diesel 60 Series Engines Pack v1.4.1 1.43 ATS

This mod contains Detroit Diesel 60 Series engines, 380, 425, 455, 515 and 615 HP. They come in three sound variants:

Variant 1: old sound of the Kapitan Kriechbaum, used in Freightliner Coronado and Cascadia trucks in previous versions to 1.36 (1).Variant 2: sound by odd_fellow, used on Freightliner Argosy truck in previous versions to 1.36 (2).Variant 3: sound by odd_fellow, used on Freightliner FLD 120 & International 9800 trucks in previous versions to 1.36 (3).

The following trucks that are added to the mod are the following:

Kenworth:W900W900B (GTM)T600 (FranckPeru)T660 (FranckPeru)T800 (FranckPeru)T800 (GTM)
